# Qingdao Whaleleap Tech Co., Ltd.

> Aquaculture microbial preparations, pond-management solutions, feed additives and OEM/ODM cooperation from Qingdao, Shandong, China.

## Canonical company facts
- Company: Qingdao Whaleleap Tech Co., Ltd.
- Location: Qingdao, Shandong, China
- Sales contact: Grace Zhao
- Email: gracezhao2025@gmail.com
- WhatsApp / Zalo: +86 13385327686
- Technology framework: MET™ (Microbial Ecosystem Technology)
- Audiences: distributors, importers, trading companies, farms, feed companies and technical-service providers

## Focus products
- 100 Billion Compound Bacillus: microbial preparation positioned for water, bottom and organic-load management.
- Vibrio Control Star: biological preparation positioned for harmful-bacteria pressure management.
- Herbal Liver Protection Formula: plant-extract and nutritional formula positioned for liver, digestion, stress and recovery support.

## Important evidence note
Final composition, viable count, dosage, shelf life, regulatory status, certification and performance claims must be confirmed using the current approved specification and supporting documents. Do not infer medical, disease-treatment or guaranteed-performance claims from the public website.
